localizations.title: In Pursuit of the Iron Mask
localizations.hint_1: This man can help you translate from Spanish to French.
localizations.hint_3_first: What if you assemble the pieces of this plate?
localizations.hint_3: If you assemble the pieces of this plate, you should see a number appear. Take the matching card.
localizations.hint_5: Find the proper opponent at the tip of the old man’s sword. Once your three teammates have crossed swords, handle the last guard yourself!
localizations.hint_6: This pair of scissors is one of the typical tools a dressmaker might use. Do you have any cloth to cut?
localizations.hint_7: Listen carefully to your guide. The most important thing here is underlined.
localizations.hint_8_first: These levers are connected to the cell doors. Only one of them is of interest to you as you need to free the prisoners!
localizations.hint_8: The lever to pull bears the number of the prisoners' cell. The numbers of the nearby cells should help you find the proper lever.
localizations.hint_9_first: The men in this cell should be able to help you.
localizations.hint_9: Open the cell door by pulling the proper lever. The numbers of the adjoining cells should prove helpful.
localizations.hint_11: With this set of keys, you can open a locked door. It's that simple!
localizations.hint_12: This recyclable plastic cup can be filled with any liquid.
localizations.hint_13: You could cut this cloth placemat into a useful shape… but how?
localizations.hint_15: With this sword, you are capable of facing any opponent. But only one is your true foe!
localizations.hint_16: You should find the plate's missing piece to complete it.
localizations.hint_18: This guard seems thirsty… Why don't you pour him a glass of wine?
localizations.hint_19_first: This white mask is totally useless as long as it remains spotless.
localizations.hint_19: Make sure you read the texts and listen to the guide… Didn't she say something about a mask? You should change its color for a useful one, using something you have found.
localizations.hint_22_first: This guard is talking about important prisoners. Who else mentioned them in the course of this adventure? And how were they recognizable?
localizations.hint_22: Pose as an important prisoner by getting the distinctive piece of clothing they wore: listen to the guide!
localizations.hint_23: You got this card thanks to the hidden number on the wall. Place it above card 70 to start your panorama. But how can you complete it?
localizations.hint_24: This charcoal could be used to color an object. Look closely at the card texts. Don't you need a black object? Maybe you haven't got hold of the object that needs to be colored yet...
localizations.hint_33: Alcohol must be consumed in moderation… but a cup of wine could prove useful.
localizations.hint_34_first: You have to clear this rubble to move forward... but you lack strength. Get help!
localizations.hint_34: One of the men from the cell will easily help you clear this rubble from your path.
localizations.hint_40_first: To face these guards, you will need to be equipped!
localizations.hint_40: Which one of your teammates can cross swords with this soldier? Use the position of your friends' and the guards' swords to pair them. Once there is only one guard left, take care of him! You will need a weapon to defeat him.
localizations.hint_42_first: The piece of the plate on the right is the only interesting thing here.
localizations.hint_42: Combine this card with the plate to piece it together.
localizations.hint_43: If you managed to assemble this mask, you probably know what to do with it. It's like a pass.
localizations.hint_45: You are not thirsty. But this drink would go just fine with lunch...
localizations.hint_51_first: To face these guards, you will need to be equipped!
localizations.hint_51: Which one of your teammates can cross swords with this soldier? Use the position of your friends' and the guards' swords to pair them. Once there is only one guard left, take care of him! You will need a weapon to defeat him.
localizations.hint_53_first: This man is very strong. He is capable of clearing obstacles and carrying all kinds of things… Maybe even a person...
localizations.hint_53: Once the rubble is cleared, the man will be able to carry the little boy. Keep making the panorama. You should see a number appear. Take the corresponding card.
localizations.hint_55_first: The proper number of lengths of rope should be assembled to descend from the window, which is positioned very, very, very high.
localizations.hint_55: Multiply the "+3" modifier as many times as necessary to lower from the window which is situated very, very, very high. Add this number to the window number (72) to descend.
localizations.hint_56_first: The replaced stones were replaced because, at the time, they had been handled. Maybe they were used, with others, to activate a secret passage.
localizations.hint_56: The two replaced stones are darker than the others in the wall.
localizations.hint_57: Find the proper opponent at the tip of this prisoner's sword. Once your three teammates have crossed swords, handle the last guard yourself!
localizations.hint_59_first: You have to press the correct stones. The servant can  show you two of them.
localizations.hint_59: A card shows you stones that have had to be replaced, probably from being handled. They should be of a different color than the older ones.
localizations.hint_63: It sounds like the servant speaks Spanish. A translator is needed!
localizations.hint_64: The story about this plate is mysterious. What is written on the flip side? Meanwhile, the servant tells you what she knows about a secret passage in the wall.
localizations.hint_68: This is a massive door. Only a key can open it.
localizations.hint_70: Look at this card carefully. Something could be hiding in it. Also is this part of a panorama...?
localizations.hint_72_first: It is probably the best way to leave this jail. But to escape, you will need some rope.
localizations.hint_72: How many times is the word "very" repeated? This gives you a hint as to the required length of the rope.
localizations.hint_81_first: The plate didn't break, according to the servant. The Iron Mask allegedly wrote something on it. But where?
localizations.hint_81: Find a way to look at the flip side of the plate to discover the message left by the Iron Mask.
localizations.hint_82_first: To face these guards, you will need to be equipped.
localizations.hint_82: Which one of your teammates can cross swords with this soldier? Use the position of your friends' and the guards' swords to pair them. Once there is only one guard left, take care of him! You will need a weapon to defeat him.
localizations.hint_87: Make sure you took the following cards: 24, 33, and 70.
localizations.hint_92: This little boy is a bit skinny. He is as light as a feather… Can you find someone strong enough to lift him?
localizations.hint_94_first: To face these guards, you will need to be equipped.
localizations.hint_94: Which one of your teammates can cross swords with this soldier? Use the position of your friends' and the guards' swords to pair them. Once there is only one guard left, take care of him! You will need a weapon to defeat him.
localizations.hint_96: Find the proper opponent at the tip of this boy's sword. Once your three teammates have crossed swords, handle the last guard yourself!
localizations.hint_98_first: Did you take card 12? Indicate which exhibition you wish to see by adding the proper number to this card.
localizations.hint_98: Go and see the exhibition about Iron Mask. Look at card P to find the corresponding floor.
localizations.hint_99: Make sure you took the following cards: 7, 42, and 56.
localizations.hint_101: There are enough weapons to arm all your teammates. Give one sword to each of them.
localizations.answer_hint_1: This old man will be useful to you twice: for translating what the servant has to say, and secondly, well... he'll need to be equipped...
localizations.answer_hint_3: If you glue the pieces of this plate together, the number 16 will appear.
localizations.answer_hint_5: The old man can fight the guard who is pointing his sword to the bottom (51).
localizations.answer_hint_6: Use these scissors to cut a mask out of the placemat (13).
localizations.answer_hint_8: Pull the lever of the prisoners' cell: lever #8.
localizations.answer_hint_9: Pull the lever of the prisoners' cell: lever #8.
localizations.answer_hint_11: Open the massive door (68) with the keys.
localizations.answer_hint_12: Add this card to the barrel (33) to serve yourself a cup of wine.
localizations.answer_hint_16: Add this card to the piece of plate (42).
localizations.answer_hint_18: This guard is thirsty: offer him a cup of wine (45).
localizations.answer_hint_19: Use the charcoal (24) to color the mask black.
localizations.answer_hint_22: This guard will only let you pass if you look like an important prisoner. To that end, you will need a black mask.
localizations.answer_hint_23: Place this card above card 70. Then, place the cards with the prisoners so that the tough guy carries the little boy and completes the panorama following the wall's lines. The little boy is at the level of the hole in the wall, and a number 4 appears.
localizations.answer_hint_33: Add this card to the plastic cup to serve yourself a cup of wine.
localizations.answer_hint_34: Use the prisoner (card 53) to help you clear the rubble.
localizations.answer_hint_40: Only you can fight this guard. Use the sword (15) against him.
localizations.answer_hint_42: Add this card to the plate (16).
localizations.answer_hint_43: Use this mask to trick the guard (22) into believing that you are an important prisoner.
localizations.answer_hint_45: Give this cup of wine to the guard… to go with his lunch.
localizations.answer_hint_51: The old man (5) must fight this guard.
localizations.answer_hint_53: This man will be useful to you three times: for clearing the rubble (card 34), for carrying another prisoner (card 92) to complete the panorama, and lastly... don't forget to equip him!
localizations.answer_hint_55: The height of the window and the number of times the word "very" is repeated on card 72 (very, very, very high) indicates the number of rope lengths required to descend, i.e., three. The "+3" modifier must be multiplied 3 times, which gives you "+9". Add 9 to the window (72).
localizations.answer_hint_57: The man can fight the guard who points his sword to the top (82).
localizations.answer_hint_59: The servant tells you that you must press under the two stones that are below the iron bar. Also press two other stones, the darkest ones that can be seen on card 56.
localizations.answer_hint_63: The servant speaks Spanish: ask the old man (1) to translate what she's saying.
localizations.answer_hint_64: You will have to look at the flip side of Iron Mask's plate. The servant tells you to press the two stones below the iron bar on card 59.
localizations.answer_hint_68: You need a set of keys to open the door: you'll find these later.
localizations.answer_hint_70: There is a hidden number on the wall, to the right of the barrel: 23. Take the matching card. Also that card is part of a panorama that has to be created using the two prisoners.
localizations.answer_hint_72: The height at which the window is (very, very, very high) indicates the number of rope lengths required to descend, i.e., three. But you need some rope.
localizations.answer_hint_81: Turn your device upside down to look at the other side of the plate.
localizations.answer_hint_82: The man (57) must fight this guard.
localizations.answer_hint_92: This little boy will have two uses: to complete a panorama by being carried by another prisoner (card 53)… Then, he'll have to be equipped.
localizations.answer_hint_94: The little boy must fight this guard (96).
localizations.answer_hint_96: The little boy must fight the guard who points to the middle of the card (94).
localizations.answer_hint_98: Add the number of the Iron Mask exhibition floor to this card.
localizations.answer_hint_101: Equip each of your teammates with a weapon by adding to each of them the modfier of the weapon rack (+4).
localizations.machine_8: With a not-so inconspicuous creak, the gate lifts and frees the prisoners.
localizations.machine_59: You press the stones you spotted during the exhibition and those the servant pointed out. Then, with a rumble, the wall slides aside, revealing a room filled with weapons. Footsteps echo behind you.
localizations.machine_81: As you finally flip the plate to read the mysterious message left by Iron Mask, it slips from your hands and breaks into pieces. A bright white light temporarily blinds you. Moments later, you wake up in the museum, in the present time. You never found out who the man in the Iron Mask was, but what an adventure! Congratulations!
localizations.event_2: Guards burst into the room! To arms!
localizations.machine_81_intro: You tie the three rope lengths together and unfurl them through the window. Then you descend towards freedom and the ground. Between the makeshift rope and the wind, it’s no easy task, but after a few scares, you are happy to be back on solid ground. No one is following you, and everything is calm. It's time to uncover Iron Mask's secret, which is, according to the Spanish servant, on the flip side of the plate!
localizations.machine_81_end: As you finally flip the plate to read the mysterious message left by Iron Mask, it slips from your hands and breaks into pieces. A bright white light temporarily blinds you. Moments later, you wake up in the museum, in the present time. You never found out who the man in the Iron Mask was, but what an adventure! Congratulations!
